segments.text: At that time you will say, {
I will praise you, Lord! Though you were angry with me, your anger is over, and now you comfort me.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Look! God is my salvation! I will trust in him and I won't be afraid! For the Lord is my strength and song, and he has saved me!
segments.speaker: Israel/Judah

segments.text: With great happiness you will take water from the well of salvation.
At that time you will say: {
Praise the Lord, shout out his name! Tell the nations what he has done—let them know of his wonderful character!
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Sing to the Lord for all the glorious things he's done—let the whole world know!
segments.speaker: Israel/Judah

segments.text: Shout loudly and sing for joy, you people of Zion, for the Holy One of Israel is great, and is among you.
segments.speaker: Israel/Judah
